label: Refraction Sleeper
description: Refraction Sleeper functions as a compact lodging cell recessed behind The Polarized Cask’s sound-damping ribs, sealed by a pressure-rated bulkhead faced in prismatic laminate. The berth is built into the wall as a narrow alcove, with vitrified-glass shelving and a fold-down work surface cut along strict, geometric lines. Polarized mirror slits admit the port’s copper-white twilight as thin, disciplined bands, preventing glare while preserving the sense of the heliopause approach lines outside. Air-handling channels run flush to the panels and maintain the tavern’s characteristic hush, leaving the space defined by controlled light and orderly reflections.
